testcase.name: @P0 @Auth Story-1.1: Authentication Journey › [P0] should redirect to dashboard after successful login (via test session injection)

error.message: [B1 Blocker] Cannot get test token for role "Admin". Ensure the backend exposes /api/auth/test-token in NODE_ENV=test.

testcase.error:
[chromium] › tests/e2e/auth.spec.ts:52:7 › @P0 @Auth Story-1.1: Authentication Journey › [P0] should redirect to dashboard after successful login (via test session injection)
Error: [B1 Blocker] Cannot get test token for role "Admin". Ensure the backend exposes /api/auth/test-token in NODE_ENV=test.
at support/fixtures/index.ts:132

testcase.name: @P1 @RBAC Story-1.2: Route Guard Enforcement › [P1] should redirect unauthenticated user away from protected route
testcase.error:
[chromium] › tests/e2e/auth.spec.ts:105:7 › @P1 @RBAC Story-1.2: Route Guard Enforcement › [P1] should redirect unauthenticated user away from protected route
Error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://localhost:3000/ Call log: - navigating to "http://localhost:3000/", waiting until "load"
